name: My workflow
description:
# SAP AI Agents

AI-powered automation agents built for mid-market SAP shops 
(SAP B1 / ByDesign) using n8n and Google Gemini.

## Invoice Email Responder
Automatically reads vendor invoice emails, looks up status 
in SAP B1, and drafts a professional reply — saving AP teams 
5-10 hours per week.

**Stack:** n8n · Google Gemini API · SAP B1 Service Layer (mock)

**To use:** Import the workflow JSON into your n8n instance 
and connect your Gemini API key.

values.content:
=You are an AP (Accounts Payable) assistant for a company using SAP B1.

A vendor has sent the following email:

From: {{ $('Edit Fields').first().json.from_email }}
Subject: {{ $('Gmail Trigger').first().json.Subject }}
Message: {{ $('Edit Fields').first().json.email_body }}

Write ONLY a professional reply email with:
- A greeting using the vendor's name
- Confirm you received their inquiry about invoice payment status
- Let them know the AP team is verifying the details in SAP B1
- Tell them they will receive a full update within 1 business day
- A polite closing signed "Accounts Payable Team"

Write only the email body. No labels, no subject line, no extra formatting.

activeVersion.name: Gmail Triggered Workflow - SAP AI Agent
activeVersion.description: Now testing with giving the gmail triggers.
